name: Santander Bank ATM
description_short: Santander Bank operates a network of ATMs across Brooklyn, NY, including standalone units and co-branded locations within CVS pharmacies for convenient cash access.
description_long: Santander Bank is a major financial institution offering ATM services throughout Brooklyn, New York. The company maintains a robust network of cash access points to serve retail and business customers across the borough. According to their location directory, Santander provides both standalone ATMs at their branch locations and co-branded ATM partnerships with CVS pharmacies at multiple addresses. The ATM network is designed to complement their full banking services, including retail online banking, mortgage accounts, business banking, investment services, and consumer credit cards. What distinguishes Santander's ATM network is the combination of extended hours (many locations operate 24/7) and widespread geographic coverage across Brooklyn neighborhoods. Their co-branded CVS partnership expands accessibility beyond traditional bank branches, placing ATMs in high-traffic retail locations. The network includes machines at financial centers as well as standalone units at pharmacy locations, offering flexibility for customers seeking cash withdrawal options. For consumers, this represents straightforward ATM access with no apparent special features or premium services—it is primarily a functional cash access solution integrated into Santander's broader banking infrastructure.
pros: 24-hour ATM availability at multiple locations (e.g., 395 Court St, 4901 Kings Hwy both open 24/7)
Extensive geographic coverage across Brooklyn with 20+ ATM locations listed
Co-branded ATM access within CVS pharmacies for convenient, high-traffic retail locations
ATMs located at Santander branch financial centers for integrated banking services
Multiple reopening times accommodate early morning banking needs (some locations open at 7am ET)
Consistent phone number support (877) 768-2265 for ATM-specific inquiries
cons: Most CVS co-branded ATMs operate on store hours (7am-8am opening), limiting early morning cash access compared to 24-hour alternatives
No information provided about ATM fees, surcharges, or whether machines are in-network fee-free for Santander customers
Limited description of ATM capabilities—no details on deposit functions, mobile check deposit integration, or other modern features
best_for: Santander Bank customers seeking convenient cash withdrawal across Brooklyn locations
Consumers in Brooklyn neighborhoods who prefer established bank ATM networks over independent operators
Retail shoppers wanting to access cash while at CVS pharmacy locations
diagnosis: Santander Bank ATM is best for existing Santander customers or Brooklyn residents seeking reliable, widespread cash access through an established bank's network. The primary caveat is the lack of transparency regarding ATM fees and limited information about modern ATM features, requiring customers to contact Santander directly for specific terms.
services: 24-hour ATM cash withdrawal at select locations
ATM access during branch operating hours (8am-9am opening times vary by location)
Co-branded ATM services within CVS pharmacy locations
ATMs located at Santander branch financial centers
Standalone ATM machines throughout Brooklyn neighborhoods
Multiple ATM locations across different Brooklyn communities (Downtown Brooklyn, Sheepshead Bay, Flatlands, Park Slope areas)
ATM services with customer support phone line (877) 768-2265
